cases.assertion: BoundRuntimeToolBoundary denies mutating/process tool calls when vac_runtime plan/artifacts are absent.
Allowed mutating MCP calls are stamped before ToolExecutor::execute_tool_call.
MCP process tools fail closed without bound runtime proof.
Free-form shell syntax is denied before local command spawn.
create/str_replace/remove reject direct file mutation without pre_patch_gate proof.
Agent cannot emit a clean done after mutating activity without closeout/completion lock.
Evidence v2 store models per-capability CAS append, xrefs, and Merkle roots.
Memory remains a planning hint and cannot relax policy gates.
